{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320124641AE528AC85BCF5E6EBA63"}"},"total":46648},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6899171586973794304","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书看着真的过瘾，好看！热血！前一百章世俗确实有点铺垫，没有那么热血沸腾，一百章以后你会觉得越看越好看，热血沸腾！又有智慧还有点贱还有点霸道！百看不厌那种，刚开始我也是朋友推荐看的，越看越想看下去，后面会越来越精彩！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1606338617,"group_id":"6569998018232192008","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+mdM5cvszYsatpgxq8DK4M=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ca2953fe46904b2dbfe05b8970fe6a72~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776534012&x-signature=9HXkT%2FOHGnWK%2FLiKnhHbQNVpABA%3D","user_id":"63568689879","user_name":"景蒙"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"63568689879","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6569998018232192008","book_info":{"abstract":"是丹帝重生？还是融合灵魂？
被盗走灵根、灵血、灵骨的三无少年——龙尘，凭借着记忆中的炼丹神术，修行神秘功法九星霸体诀，拨开重重迷雾，解开惊天之局。 　　手掌天地乾坤，脚踏日月星辰，镇压恶鬼邪神。 　　江湖传闻：龙尘一到，地吼天啸。龙尘一出，鬼泣神哭。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/029589c626889e4e8b302743e145b73a","author":"平凡魔术师","author_id":"","book_id":"6569998018232192008","book_name":"九星霸体诀","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"27.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":258,"name":"传统玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258&name=传统玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6570539844882137603","read_count":"270485","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"18080148"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"7110","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻,重生,架空,东方玄幻,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/0c93a4545443112a459fbc5630f745de~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779166001&x-signature=99rVM0FMyQ42TDFIsAa1dr0XO5w%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320124641AE528AC85BCF5E6EBA63"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读60小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":325,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":36021,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":217707,"reply_count":17,"show_pv":114523},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"6829702175954976776","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书看着特别不错，现在看这本书，又找回了当年看斗破的感觉，平日里我们不敢做的被迫忍让的一些事所积压的怨气和不满，能在书里得到宣泄，主角就像灰白电影里闯进的一个异色的人，打破那个世界里的思维方式，做事准择，有情也有义，为红颜为兄弟，也为了自己，不像其他小说写着写着有些人就丢掉了再也没出现过。故事构架清晰，情节发展也没有什么唐突的地方，作者文笔很好，不像现在的其他的一些玄幻小说太太太过于夸张，情节发展的快速无比，主角进步的轻松加愉快，没看几章呢主角已封神，这本书的一些打斗情节也写的十分精彩，不像其他书根本就没有打斗描写。这本书能让人沉进去，跟着情节发展走，对我胃口。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1590163954,"group_id":"6569998018232192008","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"雅俗共赏","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6BrU8hyoD1LUydW0iYQ8afW8PaUcozqciCTbycdY4pk","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/dd3eb5f54d024aee9916b580889c083b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776534816&x-signature=i%2BQG99Y%2FuVtAyTBygVP9m0pRm%2F4%3D","user_id":"3773119207849400","user_name":"方"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3773119207849400","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6569998018232192008","book_info":{"abstract":"是丹帝重生？还是融合灵魂？
